architect_design.notes: Design v1: Validates and supplements the detailed task spec. Key decisions: (1) system-wide install with --break-system-packages (consistency with existing torch/snntorch/scipy stack, no venv). (2) VectorBT PRO graceful fallback to OSS vectorbt if no license. (3) NautilusTrader: pip first, Rust toolchain build if no ARM64 wheel. 4 deliverables (~130L): requirements-backtest.txt, directory structure, smoke tests, setup script. ARM64 risk assessment for all 8 packages. 4 open questions for critic (VectorBT license, system vs venv, NautilusTrader ARM64, separate requirements file).

p1_builder_implement.notes: All 4 deliverables implemented. D1 requirements-backtest.txt: vectorbt, nautilus-trader, polars, duckdb, arch, skfolio (fracdiff incompatible with Python 3.12 — replaced with shim). D2 directory structure: backtesting/{data,strategies,validation,costs,utils}/ with __init__.py. D3 tests/test_backtest_env.py: 11 tests covering all imports, trivial VectorBT backtest (MA crossover), NautilusTrader engine instantiation, directory structure, fracdiff shim. D4 scripts/setup_backtest_env.sh: stepped install with ARM64 fallbacks. Installed versions: vectorbt 0.28.4, nautilus_trader 1.224.0, polars 1.39.3, duckdb 1.5.1, arch 8.0.0, skfolio 0.16.1. VectorBT PRO not available (no license) — OSS fallback active. fracdiff package incompatible with Python 3.12 (requires <3.10) — wrote fracdiff_shim.py (30L numpy-based fdiff). numpy upgraded 1.26.4→2.4.3 by polars dependency. Pipeline verify 7/7 GREEN, pytest 11/11 passed.

p1_builder_bugfix.notes: Bugfix audit: no bugs found. 11/11 pytest passed, 7/7 pipeline verify GREEN. All packages import clean, VectorBT trivial backtest runs, NautilusTrader engine instantiates, directory structure verified, fracdiff shim validated.

p1_critic_review.notes: APPROVED: 0 BLOCKs, 0 HIGH FLAGs, 1 MED FLAG. All packages installed and functional: vectorbt 0.28.4 (OSS fallback — VectorBT PRO not available), nautilus_trader 1.224.0 (ARM64 wheel worked), polars 1.39.3, duckdb 1.5.1, arch 8.0.0, skfolio 0.16.1, numba 0.64.0. fracdiff replaced with a pure-Python shim (fdiff function, ~50L) — correct implementation of López de Prado Ch.5 fractional differencing. 11/11 pytest pass, 7/7 pipeline verify GREEN. Directory structure created. pandas 2.3.3 + polars 1.39.3 coexist without conflict. FLAG-1 MED: VectorBT PRO not installed (no license) — OSS vectorbt used as fallback. PRO features (advanced portfolio analytics, parameter optimization) unavailable until license acquired.
